name: branch-promotion-discipline
description: 3-tier long-lived branch hierarchy (develop / uat / main), one-way promotion (develop to uat to main), per-tier CI gate matrix, source-ref enforcement (no skipping tiers, no backflow), hotfix flow (hotfix to uat with forward-merge to develop), branch protection ruleset, pre-commit hook setup. Layer above multi-agent-git-workflow: that skill ends at develop; this one starts there. Common failure modes covered: develop merged direct to main (skipping uat), main hotfix not forward-merged (causing drift), uat receiving direct pushes that bypass develop, gate matrix collapsed to one set across all tiers.
